info.name: MDM MVP - Customer Management
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for testing the MDM (Master Data Management) MVP system with CQRS architecture.

## Collection Structure

1. **Health & Setup** - Service health checks
2. **Command Side (Write)** - Customer ingestion
3. **Query Side (Read)** - Customer queries
4. **Survivable Matching Examples** - Test the 5 matching rules
5. **Security** - OAuth2 testing
6. **Validation & Errors** - Error handling
7. **Observability** - Metrics

## Environment Variables

- `base_url_ingestion`: http://localhost:8080
- `base_url_mastering`: http://localhost:8081
- `oauth_token`: JWT token (optional)

## Quick Start

1. Import collection to Postman
2. Import environment
3. Run requests in order

item.name: 00 - OAuth2 Authentication

request.description: Get JWT token for admin user (full access: ADMIN, CUSTOMER_WRITE, CUSTOMER_READ)
Get JWT token for regular user (write access only: CUSTOMER_WRITE)
Get JWT token for read-only user (read access only: CUSTOMER_READ)
Get JWT token using client credentials flow (machine-to-machine)
Get current user information from OAuth2 server
Get OAuth2/OpenID Connect configuration

item.description: OAuth2 authentication and token management. Run these first to get JWT tokens for API requests.

request.description: Shows all 5 health indicators: db, kafka, mdmProcessing, liveness, readiness
Ingest first customer. Returns 202 Accepted (async processing). Requires OAuth2 token with CUSTOMER_WRITE scope.
Wait 5 seconds for Kafka processing to complete
Submit duplicate with same email (different case). Should be detected as exact email match duplicate.
Submit with nickname 'Jon' instead of 'John'. Should be detected via nickname matching rule.
Submit with typo 'Jone' instead of 'John'. Should be detected via Levenshtein distance rule.
Submit 'Rupert Smyth' which sounds like 'Robert Smith'. Should be detected via Soundex phonetic matching.
Submit with different phone format '(555) 222-3333' vs '555-222-3333'. Should match via phone normalization.
Submit with email typo 'exmple.com' instead of 'example.com'. Should be detected via email similarity rule.
Submit Gmail with dots. Gmail ignores dots so 'j.o.h.n.d.o.e@gmail.com' = 'johndoe@gmail.com'.
Submit 'Bob' which is a nickname for 'Robert'. Should match via nickname rule.
Check how many duplicates were detected from the survivable matching examples.
Get complete SLO status including availability, error budget, burn rate, and severity level.
Get simplified SLO health status (quick check).
Get detailed health status showing all 5 health indicators: db, kafka, mdmProcessing, liveness, readiness.
Get error count for burn rate calculation.
Get total events for error budget calculation.
Get latency histogram for p50/p95/p99 calculation.
Get deduplication lookup latency (SLO: 99% < 10ms).
Prometheus query for availability SLI calculation (reference).
Verify SLO target is configured correctly (99.9% availability).
